130→class TestOneShot: 131→ """Tests for one_shot MCP tool.""" 132→ 133→ @patch("erk_mcp.server._run_erk") 134→ def test_passes_prompt_to_erk(self, mock_run_erk: patch) -> None: 135→ json_output = '{"success": true, "pr_number": 42, "pr_url": "https://github.com/test/repo/pull/42", "run_url": "https://github.com/test/repo/actions/runs/123", "run_id": "123", "branch_name": "plnd/fix-bug-03-09-1234"}' 136→ mock_run_erk.return_value = subprocess.CompletedProcess( 137→ args=[], returncode=0, stdout=json_output, stderr="" 138→ ) 139→ 140→ result = one_shot(prompt="Fix the bug in auth") 141→ 142→ assert result == json_output 143→ mock_run_erk.assert_called_once_with(["one-shot", "--json", "Fix the bug in auth"]) 144→ 145→ @patch("erk_mcp.server._run_erk") 146→ def test_propagates_runtime_error(self, mock_run_erk: patch) -> None: 147→ mock_run_erk.side_effect = RuntimeError("erk one-shot --json failed (exit 1): timeout") 148→ 149→ with pytest.raises(RuntimeError, match="timeout"):
